title: rubus fontivagus
side_effects: Rubus fontivagus can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing nausea, headaches, and allergic reactions in some individuals. In severe cases, excessive consumption of the plant's extracts may lead to liver damage and kidney failure. Additionally, improper use of Rubus fontivagus may also cause skin irritation, hives, and respiratory issues in susceptible people. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using Rubus fontivagus for any health benefits to avoid these potential side effects.
